name: carousel-spacing
visual_summary: The Carousel Spacing component is a flexible horizontal layout that allows you to display multiple items on a single line, with adjustable spacing between them. It's suitable for use in hero sections, product showcases, or any place where you want to make a visually appealing list of items. Developers can use it for a variety of use cases where flexible spacing and layout customization is necessary.
